last_item: Mode-S convergence pass (backlog actionable-empty after iter 24 — only NEEDS-BACKEND items + low/watch copy nits remain). Ran the 5-agent parallel discovery panel, same coverage as iters 15–24, HIGH bar + full shipped/rejected digest: (1) Dashboard+Query, (2) Roles+Backups+BackupStorageForm, (3) Alerts+Migrate, (4) Settings+DatabaseTuning+Pooler+Login, (5) nav/IA+first-run+cross-view consistency.
last_result: ALL FIVE VIEWS CONVERGED. Four agents hard-converged (no candidate). The Roles/Backups agent floated ONE borderline candidate — gate the Restore… / Test-a-restore / Deep-restore-test buttons on hasNoBackups (history.data.backups.length===0) — and self-rated it medium-LOW, explicitly saying 'CONVERGED if the bar is clearly high/medium.' Self-rejected on inspection (decisive evidence, no panel, iter-5/13 precedent): (a) the empty state is ALREADY shown twice — the BackupStatusSummary danger Callout 'No backups yet — your data is not protected' (Backups.tsx:488, rendered :220) + the Backup-history EmptyState 'No backups yet / Run your first backup' (:256); the proposed button titles restate it a third time (rejected iter-6/7/13 pattern: surface a fact only when otherwise hidden). (b) RestoreModal is a TYPED-CONFIRM destructive flow (must type 'main', :821/:835) so no data harm is possible — an empty repo yields a CLEAR server error, not a silent failure. (c) Test/Deep restore tests are READ-ONLY verifications, harmless on an empty repo. (d) the hasRunningBackup gate it wants to mirror prevents a REAL conflict (two concurrent backups); 'nothing to restore' is a one-time fresh-instance state with an honest error, not a conflict. The other backend-coupled finds (Pooler EnabledView doesn't list routed roles — PoolerStatus carries no roles field; Migrate/Settings 'configure in Settings' stale hint comes from backend WithHint) are OUT OF SCOPE for this frontend-only loop. No code shipped, docs-only commit, no hard gates needed. Per the contract (backlog actionable-empty AND fresh discovery surfaced no high/med item): FIRST stable_streak increment 0 -> 1. Two more clean passes -> write COMPLETE.md and stop.
notes: PURE UX-IMPROVEMENT LOOP. Sibling of the COMPLETED scripts/ralph/ shadcn-migration track. Capability parity is sacred (Vitest suite is the contract); layout/flow/copy are free to change. Restraint over churn -- rejecting a change and recording why is a normal outcome. Frontend/UX only, never touch Go. go build is blocked in-sandbox (snap-confine); run with sandbox disabled. See PROMPT.md + UX-PRINCIPLES.md + PERSONAS.md + UI-RULES.md.
north_star: The indiepg panel is the easiest, clearest, safest way for an indie hacker to run their Postgres -- minimal surface, co-located workflows, honest state, no over-design. Stop when the UX has converged (stable_streak >= 3).
